Why RISENFLEX works

Everything your body
needs to unlock

📋

Mobility assessment

5-min test reveals exactly where your body is limited — hips, shoulders, spine, ankles.

📅

Daily programs

A fresh routine every day, built around your weakest areas first.

▶️

Expert video guides

Follow along with real expert videos for every single exercise.

📈

Track improvement

Re-test every 4 weeks and watch your mobility scores climb.

Your mobility score preview

where you're stuck
